series_metadata.series_description: Portions of administrative manual containing administrative rules, policies and procedures that have been authored by Legal. Files include transmittal letters for county and state policy and revisions to the administrative procedure manual (APMTL).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced, and send for review by State Archives prior to disposition. ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced, and send for review by State Archives prior to disposition., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
